v.family: Franklin Templeton (Franklin Custodian Funds → Franklin Templeton ETF Trust)
v._evidence: 497 2023-04-14: 'At a meeting of the Board on December 14-15, 2022 ... Management recommended ... approve the Reorganization' into Franklin Focused Growth ETF; special meeting 2023-06-30; closing date not stated

FT ETF Trust N-14 2024-09-12: 'Like the Target Fund, the Acquiring Fund is an open-end, registered management investment company operating as an exchange-traded fund' — ETF-to-ETF merger (Western Asset Total Return ETF → Western Asset Bond ETF, closing ~2025-01-10), not a mutual fund conversion
FT ETF Trust 497 2024-10-21: Target Fund is Western Asset Total Return ETF (itself an ETF) merging into Western Asset Bond ETF — ETF-to-ETF, not a mutual fund conversion
Frost Family of Funds EX-99.16.10.C 2019-03-15: Rule 18f-3 multiple class plan exhibit; no conversion event
Frost Family of Funds EX-99.28.N 2019-05-30: Rule 18f-3 multiple class plan exhibit; no conversion event

v.family: Gotham Asset Management (FundVantage Trust → Tidal ETF Trust)
v._evidence: FundVantage 497 supplement dated 2023-07-27: Board approved reorganization of Gotham Short Strategies Fund into Gotham Short Strategies ETF (newly created Tidal ETF Trust series), subject to shareholder approval; board meeting date not stated → announce = document date; short-strategies fund → other

FundVantage 497 supplement dated 2025-02-21: Board approved reorganization of Polen Bank Loan Fund into Polen Floating Rate Income ETF 'expected to occur on or about March 21, 2025'; reverse stock split to $25.00 NAV before conversion; board date not stated → announce = document date
